# Angeli Gardens

> Expert landscaping and garden services based in Maidenhead, Berkshire. Checkatrade approved with a 4.9/5 rating. Serving SL1–SL9 postcodes, London, and Surrey.

## About

Angeli Gardens is a professional landscaping and garden maintenance company founded and run by Marley Angeli. Based in Maidenhead (SL6), we have over 10 years of experience transforming outdoor spaces for residential and commercial clients. We are fully insured, licensed for green waste disposal, and come fully equipped.

We are Checkatrade approved — you can view our verified reviews at: https://www.checkatrade.com/trades/AngeliGardens

## Services

- Garden Maintenance (weekly, fortnightly, monthly contracts)
- Hedge Trimming & Topiary
- Tree Pruning & Surgery
- Garden Clearance & Green Waste Removal
- Planting & Border Design
- Lawn Treatment & Renovation (scarification, aeration, overseeding, turfing)
- Patio & Paving Installation (natural stone, porcelain)
- Decking (composite & timber)
- Fencing (panel, close board, picket, gates)
- Shed Bases & Outbuilding Installation
- Raised Beds & Planters
- Garden Walls & Structures
- Artificial Grass Installation
- Pressure Washing

## Primary Service Area — Maidenhead & SL Postcodes

Based in Maidenhead (SL6), we regularly work across:
- SL1 — Slough
- SL2 — Slough, Farnham Common, Stoke Poges
- SL3 — Slough, Langley, Colnbrook
- SL4 — Windsor, Eton, Old Windsor
- SL5 — Ascot, Sunningdale, Sunninghill
- SL6 — Maidenhead, Taplow, Cookham, Bray, Furze Platt
- SL7 — Marlow, Little Marlow
- SL8 — Bourne End, Wooburn Green
- SL9 — Gerrards Cross, Chalfont St Peter

## Wider Service Areas

- **Berkshire:** Reading, Windsor, Bracknell, Wokingham, Newbury, Ascot, Sandhurst
- **Surrey:** Guildford, Woking, Epsom, Reigate, Dorking, Esher, Cobham, Weybridge
- **London:** All London boroughs including Richmond, Kensington, Wimbledon, Fulham, Putney

Sunday: Closed
